intentAndPurpose.intent: `Field.Root` + **Checkbox** with integrated `Field.Label` / `Field.Description`, optional `infoIconSlot`, `error` / `feedback`, native `Field.Error` slot, and optional `InputDynamicText` row — same composition contract as **InputField** (Figma `.DNA/InputField` stack; control DNA from Checkbox). Colour follows `appearance` on the inner Checkbox.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Appearance role — border, hover, and checked fill. `auto` → secondary stack.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: For composite fields — links to `Field.Description` etc.

props.name: aria-invalid
props.description: Invalid state for form validation (exposed on the checkbox control).

props.name: aria-label
props.description: For `labelWrapper="div"` — required accessible name when there is no inner label text

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the checkbox is checked (controlled)

props.name: children
props.description: Multiple standalone **Checkbox** options. When set, `label` / `description` render as the field header above the list; `feedback` and `dynamicText` / `dynamicTextSlot` render below the list. Omit for a single integrated field (label and description beside the control per Figma).

props.name: className
props.description: className property

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Default checked state (uncontrolled)

props.name: description
props.description: Description below the label row.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the checkbox is disabled

props.name: dynamicText
props.description: Leading copy for `InputDynamicText`. Ignored when `dynamicTextSlot` is set.

props.name: dynamicTextSlot
props.description: Dynamic text row — pass `<InputDynamicText … />`. When set, `dynamicText` and `helperButton` are ignored.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message (shorthand for `InputFeedback` variant negative).

props.name: feedback
props.description: Feedback slot — pass `<InputFeedback … />` or use `error` string.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretch to fill container width.

props.name: groupDefaultValue
props.description: Multi-option default checked values (uncontrolled). Use with `children`.

props.name: groupValue
props.description: Multi-option checked values (controlled). Use with `children`.

props.name: helperButton
props.description: Trailing action label for `InputDynamicText`. Ignored when `dynamicTextSlot` is set.

props.name: id
props.description: HTML id attribute

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Whether the checkbox is in indeterminate state

props.name: infoIconSlot
props.description: Trailing control beside the label (e.g. custom info `IconButton`, menu, or `InputFieldDefaultInfo`).

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the field invalid for `Field.Root` and error chrome on the checkbox wrapper.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text for the field header (multi-option) or integrated checkbox label (single).

props.name: labelWrapper
props.description: Outer wrapper element. Use `'div'` inside `CheckboxField` (with `Field.Label`) so the visible label is not nested inside a second `<label>`.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name for form submission

props.name: onCheckedChange
props.description: Change handler

props.name: onGroupValueChange
props.description: Multi-option change handler. Use with `children`.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the checkbox is read-only (visually distinct from disabled)

props.name: required
props.description: HTML required — form validation when unchecked

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset. Default: 'm'

props.name: style
props.description: style property

props.name: validate
props.description: Custom validation — return message(s) or null.

props.name: validationMode
props.description: Validation mode for `Field.Root`.

props.name: value
props.description: Value used when inside a CheckboxGroup
